rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN PRICE STARKS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. No hearing notes will be sent. Issues are continued administration of the estate and the request to transfer the funds to the petitioner's trust account. Counsel may be asked why there is only $345.97 in the trust account as the last status report said there was just over $165 and the court ordered another $750 to be transferred to that account.
